title: ajania variifolia
intro: Ajania variifolia, also known as wild chamomile or Manchurian chamomile, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, characterized by its feathery foliage and small white flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ajania variifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and supporting immune function. Ajania variifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
